name: 72"x14" Ribbon Love Table Runner White - Threshold™
description:
Bring a gorgeous vibe to your dining table with this Ribbon Love Table Runner from Threshold™. This woven table runner showcases red ribbon "love" text repeated on a white backdrop for charming V-Day style. Made from 100% cotton fabric, this woven table runner helps protect your table from accidental spills, and it's machine washable for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
